title: sida quinquevalvacea
intro: Sida quinquevalvacea, also known as the five-lobed sida or five-valved sida, is a plant species belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Sida quinquevalvacea is often used in tea or tincture form to harness its medicinal benefits.
